name: Lina
description: Fire makes a fine servant, but a harsh mistress. Lina, the Slayer.

abilities.name: Slow Burn
abilities.description: All Lina's spells now applies a portion of the impact damage as damage per second debuff.

abilities.name: Dragon Slave
abilities.description: In the scorched barren of Misrule, Lina learned to manipulate the fiery breath of the Desert Wyrm as a form of entertainment.

abilities.name: Light Strike Array
abilities.description: Summons a column of flames that damages and stuns enemies.

abilities.name: Fiery Soul
abilities.description: Grants a stack of bonus attack speed and bonus movement speed per enemy unit affected per ability cast. Grants stacks per unit hit per ability cast as per normal, not limited to 's abilities.

abilities.name: Flame Cloak
abilities.description: Lina ascends and grants herself unobstructed movement, spell damage amplification and bonus magic resistance. Acquiring while drafting unlocks this ability. Grants all ability effects to the drafting hero's model in this game-mode.

abilities.name: Laguna Blade
abilities.description: Fires off a bolt of lightning at a single enemy unit, dealing massive damage.
